title: toona febrifuga
intro: Toona febrifuga, also known as the Australian red cedar, is a species of tree native to Australia and New Guinea. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Toona febrifuga include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The herbal preparations of Toona febrifuga include teas, infusions, and tinctures made from its leaves, bark, and roots, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
